content:
# Permeability

**Summary**: The ability of a rock to allow fluids to flow through it.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-alqubalee|Alqubalee, 2017]] measured permeability to evaluate reservoir quality.

- [[1999-iddris|Iddris, 1999]] assessed permeability in the context of gas flow during oxidation.

- [[2002-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2002]] mapped permeability distribution in the Arab-D reservoir.

- [[1993-kandil|Kandil, 1993]] used permeability to calculate critical flow rates.

- [[1998-khan|Khan, 1998]] Not used directly as a measurement, but the Hele-Shaw model simulates flow in a porous medium.

- [[2000-khan|Khan, 2000]] measured permeability in tight rock samples using PPD.

- [[1995-magaji|Magaji, 1995]] measured permeability using a gas permeameter and estimated it from grain/pore size data.

- [[1990-mimoune|Mimoune, 1990]] evaluated permeability in both the formation and the fracture.

- [[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001]] measured return permeability to evaluate the impact of drilling fluid on formation damage.

- [[2000-mohammad|Mohammad, 2000]] measured permeability as part of the petrophysical characterization of the Khobar aquifer.

- [[1999-al-muhareb|Al-Muhareb, 1999]] measured permeability at various stages (pre-damage, post-damage, and post-stimulation).

- [[1990-al-mumen|Al-Mumen, 1990]] measured absolute permeability for the Berea core samples.

- [[1995-okasha|OKASHA, 1995]] measured the absolute permeability of the Berea sandstone cores.

- [[1992-al-otaibi|Al-Otaibi, 1992]] analyzed absolute and relative permeability as key factors in reservoir flow.

- [[2001-sultan|SULTAN, 2001]] Not stated in source

- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] used permeability values of 500 mD in all directions.

- [[2009-al-gathe|AL-GATHE, 2009]] measured permeability for each core sample under both ambient and stressed conditions.

- [[2009-al-gathe-2|AL-GATHE, 2009]] measured permeability to characterize the carbonate core samples.

- [[2009-mansur|Mansur, 2009]] investigated how geometry and anisotropy affect permeability measurements from drill cuttings.

- [[2009-sitouah|Sitouah, 2009]] measured permeability as a key factor for reservoir modeling.

- [[2009-bajaalah|BAJAALAH, 2009]] measured permeability in both matrix and fracture systems.

- [[2010-alroudhan|AlRoudhan, 2010]] calculated permeability for non-cored wells using predicted hydraulic flow units.

- [[2011-al-dhufairi|AL-DHUFAIRI, 2011]] used permeability as a primary predictor variable for AI models.

- [[2011-al-dossary|Al-Dossary, 2011]] measured permeability in cement samples to evaluate zonal isolation.

- [[2011-al-nasser|Al-Nasser, 2011]] measured permeability to characterize the hydraulic units.

- [[2011-alburaikan|AlBuraikan, 2011]] determined permeability values for well X-1 using PTA analysis.

- [[2012-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2012]] Not stated in source

- [[2012-baarimah|BAARIMAH, 2012]] analyzed permeability as a primary variable for well performance.

- [[2012-geri|Geri, 2012]] evaluated filter cake permeability using various models including those by Hassen, Tiller, and Li et al.

- [[2012-al-arfaj|Al-Arfaj, 2012]] correlated permeability with lithology and porosity to determine deliverability.

- [[2012-kamal|Kamal, 2012]] analyzed horizontal and vertical permeability as primary drivers for well performance.

- [[2013-nooruddin|Nooruddin, 2013]] evaluated various models for predicting permeability from MICP data.

- [[2012-elhaj|Elhaj, 2012]] evaluated the relationship between porosity and permeability in carbonate rocks.

- [[2013-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2013]] measured core permeability before and after treatment with chelating agents.

- [[2013-el-kheir|El-Kheir, 2013]] estimated permeability from core-derived relationships.

- [[2013-geri|Geri, 2013]] determined the absolute permeability using Darcy's law.

- [[2012-al-abdulmohsin|Al-Abdulmohsin, 2012]] evaluated permeability variations in homogeneous layers to see how they mask or reveal fracture signatures.

- [[2013-kareem|Kareem, 2013]] modeled permeability as a function of porosity and mineral dissolution.

- [[2013-sibaweihi|Sibaweihi, 2013]] used permeability to characterize the reservoir's flow capacity.

- [[2013-khan-2|Khan, 2013]] modeled as modified permeability (k) in the presence of memory effects.

- [[2013-al-nemer|Al-Nemer, 2013]] determined permeability values for both horizontal and dual porosity models.

- [[2013-mehmood|Mehmood, 2013]] used permeability as the primary parameter for upscaling and history matching.

- [[2013-murtaza|Murtaza, 2013]] measured permeability to assess the sealing capability of the cement slurry.

- [[2014-waseem|Waseem, 2014]] measured permeability to determine the impact of mineral distribution on fluid flow.

- [[2014-el-deek|El-Deek, 2014]] measured permeability to assess the impact of heterogeneity on reservoir quality.

- [[2014-ali|Ali, 2014]] mapped permeability across multiple layers in both Example 1 and Example 2.

- [[2014-sami|Sami, 2014]] measured the permeability of the samples.

- [[2014-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 2014]] used to characterize rock/well performance in U-shaped wells.

- [[2014-al-ismael|AL-ISMAEL, 2014]] analyzed permeability distribution in Model 1 to understand flow paths.

- [[2014-al-ameri|AL-AMERI, 2014]] measured permeability to assess the impact of CO2 on flow paths.

- [[2015-adebayo|Adebayo, 2015]] measured permeability to assess the impact of carbonate dissolution and precipitation.

- [[2015-barri|Barri, 2015]] monitored permeability changes during the core flooding process.

- [[2015-alsahaf|Alsahaf, 2015]] used permeability as the primary target for super-hybrid prediction models.

- [[2015-thalab|Thalab, 2015]] measured permeability to assess the effectiveness of the cement as a barrier.

- [[2015-al-amri|Al-Amri, 2015]] evaluated permeability as the primary indicator of reservoir flow capacity.

- [[2015-adeniji|Adeniji, 2015]] estimated reservoir permeability distribution using water cut data.

- [[2015-jabir|Jabir, 2015]] calculated permeability based on a predefined relationship with porosity from core analysis.

- [[2015-elzain|Elzain, 2015]] measured permeability to evaluate reservoir quality.

- [[2015-khan|KHAN, 2015]] modeled permeability distribution across 10 layers for both SAGD and VAPEX.

- [[2015-khan-2|Khan, 2015]] measured the permeability of cement slurries to evaluate long-term performance.

- [[2015-mohammed-2|Mohammed, 2015]] measured permeability changes during CO2 injection in carbonate reservoirs.

- [[2016-abbas|Abbas, 2016]] measured permeability to assess reservoir quality.

- [[2016-hassan-2|Hassan, 2016]] investigated the porosity-permeability relationship within the lithofacies.

- [[2016-hamza|HAMZA, 2016]] measured permeability before and after stimulation to determine enhancement ratios.

- [[2016-adam|ADAM, 2016]] measured absolute permeability for core sets B and C.

- [[2016-mahboob|MAHBOOB, 2016]] analyzed permeability distribution and its impact on water flood performance in stratified reservoirs.

- [[2016-makkawi|Makkawi, 2016]] measured permeability from core plugs and modeled it using geostatistical methods.

- [[2016-geri|GERI, 2016]] measured filter-cake permeability to assess the flow resistance of the filter cake.

- [[2016-jad|Jad, 2016]] measured permeability for both Berea and Bandera Brown samples before and after damage.

- [[2017-al-hajri|Al-Hajri, 2017]] not used directly as a primary calculation variable in this thesis.

- [[2017-mohammed-3|MOHAMMED, 2017]] measured permeability in core samples to evaluate the impact of fracturing fluids.

- [[2016-david|DAVID, 2016]] investigated the reduction in permeability due to non-isothermal conditions and fines migration.

- [[2017-jafarov|Jafarov, 2017]] compared initial and return permeability to assess damage from drilling fluids.

- [[2017-baig|Baig, 2017]] measured permeability to assess the effectiveness of Nano zeolite as an additive.

- [[2017-khan|Khan, 2017]] modeled the change in fracture permeability due to stress and sorption-induced swelling.

- [[2017-elyamani|ElYamani, 2017]] measured permeability to assess the reservoir's flow potential.

- [[2017-adam-2|Adam, 2017]] measured permeability to assess the flow potential of different lithofacies.

- [[2017-yousif|Yousif, 2017]] measured permeability to assess the reservoir quality of the Dhruma Formation.

- [[2017-muqtadir|Muqtadir, 2017]] measured the permeability of the tight sandstone samples.

- [[2017-hasan|Hasan, 2017]] analyzed permeability as the primary dependent variable for correlation development.

- [[2018-aleid|Aleid, 2018]] evaluated permeability as a primary factor in the flow regime analysis.

- [[2018-jamal|Jamal, 2018]] used permeability values to differentiate between Darcy and Brinkman flow regimes.

- [[2019-al-azani|AL-AZANI, 2019]] measured permeability to characterize the limestone samples.

- [[2019-suleiman-3|Suleiman, 2019]] measured permeability to ensure treatment did not reduce the rock's flow capacity.

- [[2019-gomaa|Gomaa, 2019]] measured permeability to evaluate the effectiveness of acidizing treatments.

- [[2019-elsayed|Elsayed, 2019]] analyzed permeability as a primary indicator of flow restriction caused by tortuosity.

- [[2019-abdelaal|Abdelaal, 2019]] measured permeability in the sandstone cores using Darcy's law.

- [[2019-g201703430kfupmedusa|g201703430@kfupm.edu.sa, 2019]] estimated permeability using the Lattice-Boltzmann Method (LBM).

- [[2020-abdallah|Abdallah, 2020]] evaluated permeability as a critical factor for the mobility of CO2 within the reservoir.

- [[2020-al-zoukani|Al-Zoukani, 2020]] measured permeability to determine the flow potential of different lithofacies.

- [[2020-islam|Islam, 2020]] measured permeability to assess reservoir quality.

- [[2020-aly|Aly, 2020]] measured permeability for both the large blocks and the linear core plugs.

- [[2020-mansouri|Mansouri, 2020]] investigated the distribution of hydraulic conductivity.

- [[2020-hiba|HIBA, 2020]] measured permeability to ensure high conductivity after consolidation.

- [[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021]] measured permeability to assess reservoir connectivity and heterogeneity.

- [[2020-mahmoud|Mahmoud, 2020]] measured the permeability of cement samples before and after exposure to CO2-saturated brine.

- [[2021-al-shuqayyiqi|Al-Shuqayyiqi, 2021]] measured brine permeability using the Darcy equation.

- [[2022-khan|Khan, 2022]] measured permeability to assess the flow characteristics of the carbonate sediments.

- [[2022-syahputra|Syahputra, 2022]] measured permeability to determine flow potential in burrowed strata.

- [[2022-samarkin|Samarkin, 2022]] measured the permeability of carbonate rocks before and after chemical treatment.

- [[2021-gasimli|Gasimli, 2021]] measured rock permeability before and after scale formation.

- [[2021-serag|SERAG, 2021]] evaluated permeability damage caused by mud-rock interaction.

- [[2021-khan|KHAN, 2021]] measured the reduction in permeability due to interaction with IL-based fluids.

- [[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022]] quantified permeability and its anisotropy across various rock fabrics.

- [[2022-suleiman|Suleiman, 2022]] used as a primary output for machine learning models trained on NMR T2 distributions.

- [[2022-bashri|Bashri, 2022]] measured permeability to characterize the reservoir.

- [[2022-alsulaiman|AlSulaiman, 2022]] analyzed the impact of permeability on acid fracturing productivity.

- [[2022-babker|Babker, 2022]] measured permeability to evaluate reservoir quality.

- [[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022]] evaluated permeability as an input parameter for its impact on wormhole propagation.

- [[2023-afagwu|AFAGWU, 2023]] developed an apparent permeability model for shale containing realistic kerogen.

- [[2023-al-garni|Al-Garni, 2023]] measured permeability as a function of confining pressure (SDK).

- [[2023-arrofi|Arrofi, 2023]] investigated permeability in the context of identifying geothermal reservoirs.

- [[2023-sadeed|Sadeed, 2023]] analyzed the effect of permeability on CRM parameters.

- [[2023-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2023]] used permeability as a primary parameter for matching in the inverse modeling process.

- [[2023-baig|Baig, 2023]] measured permeability to ensure the sand remains productive.

- [[2024-mohamed|Mohamed, 2024]] measured gas permeability in the core samples during different stages.

- [[2023-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2023]] measured permeability to evaluate the impact of additives on cement quality.

- [[2023-pratama|PRATAMA, 2023]] measured permeability to assess the impact of acid-induced dissolution on flow capacity.

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] measured permeability to evaluate the effectiveness of cleanup treatments.

- [[2024-abdrabo|Abdrabo, 2024]] measured permeability to assess the flow potential of the Qalibah Formation.

- [[2024-saraih|Saraih, 2024]] measured permeability for 28 core plugs using a multi-probe scanner.

- [[2024-suleiman|Suleiman, 2024]] evaluated the impact of wormholes on rock permeability.

- [[2024-suleiman-4|Suleiman, 2024]] measured permeability and leak-off rates to evaluate the effectiveness of the water shut-off treatment.

- [[2024-yusmananto|Yusmananto, 2024]] evaluated permeability across different facies in the Upper Kharaib Member.

- [[2024-muhammed|Muhammed, 2024]] evaluated permeability as a factor influencing the mobility and distribution of hydrogen in the reservoir.

- [[2024-badhafere|BADHAFERE, 2024]] evaluated the impact of geochemical reactions on aquifer permeability.

- [[2024-alabdrabalnabi|Alabdrabalnabi, 2024]] analyzed how chemical treatments reduce water permeability in target zones.

- [[2024-muharrag|Muharrag, 2024]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2024-akomolafe|Akomolafe, 2024]] measured permeability to assess the impact of drilling fluid on flow characteristics.

- [[2025-ahmed|Ahmed, 2025]] evaluated permeability in the Minjur Sandstone for flow potential.

- [[1991-ali|Ali, 1991]] calculated permeability from mercury capillary pressure data using multiple methods.

- [[1992-al-otaibi-2|Al-Otaibi, 1992]] evaluated the effect of absolute permeability and Kv/Kx ratios on pseudo curves.

- [[1991-ali-2|Ali, 1991]] calculated permeability from mercury capillary pressure data using Katz and Thompson's method and Swanson's correlation.

- [[2004-ahmed|Ahmed, 2004]] monitored the reduction in core permeability due to scale deposition.

- [[1994-al-fattah|Al-Fattah, 1994]] analyzed the relationship between rock properties and relative permeability.

- [[1996-al-hajji|Al-Hajji, 1996]] evaluated the impact of permeability anisotropy on flow behavior.

- [[2000-hamid|Hamid, 2000]] measured permeability in both whole cores and core plugs using pulse-decay and steady-state methods.

- [[1995-hussain|Hussain, 1995]] measured air permeability for core samples to select candidates for displacement experiments.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods
